chosen.theme: Solana Layer-1 Institutional Breakout — Firedancer 1M TPS Milestone and $1B Spot ETF AUM Signal Smart Contract Platform Leadership Shift
chosen.news_one_liner: Firedancer's 1M TPS and $1B spot ETF AUM together give SOL's $250–$300 price targets both a technical and institutional demand foundation simultaneously.
